title: cleidion tricoccum
intro: Cleidion tricoccum, also known as Eastern Cleidion or Cleidion, is a species of flowering plant in the family Annonaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Cleidion tricoccum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of Cleidion tricoccum include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to make capsules or tinctures for internal use.
